summary.intent: Extend the Gossamer session monitoring tool with AI-generated interaction overviews and a full Entire CLI checkpoint integration (indexing, API, and UI), then refine the checkpoint rendering in the SessionDetail log view.
summary.outcome: InteractionOverview table and backfill pipeline were added; Entire CLI checkpoints are indexed into SQLite (including normalized CheckpointSummary) and exposed via multiple API routes; a Checkpoints list screen and CheckpointDetail screen were built; checkpoint rows were interleaved into SessionDetail with an expandable summary dropdown styled to match existing event card conventions.

repo: Prisma schema uses `@unique` on `CheckpointSession.sessionId` to store canonical latest-state records ‚Äî a separate `CheckpointSessionLink` join table is required to track the full many-to-many history of (checkpoint, session) pairs.
The Entire CLI checkpoint format uses a two-level shard tree: `<root>/<2hex>/<10hex>/` with root `metadata.json`, session subdirs `0/`, `1/`, each containing `metadata.json` + `full.jsonl`.

The `full.jsonl` event types are: user, assistant, progress, file-history-snapshot, system ‚Äî with fields uuid, parentUuid, sessionId, timestamp, cwd, gitBranch, slug, planContent, toolUseId, parentToolUseId, message/data.
The session `metadata.json` summary shape is `{ intent, outcome, learnings: { repo[], code[{path,finding}], workflow[] }, friction[], open_items[] }` ‚Äî only present in newer Entire CLI versions.
The server is a long-running process; schema/code changes require a manual restart to take effect.
The existing event cards (User/Assistant/ToolGroup) use a 4px left border as the primary visual differentiator; labels are `fontSize: 12, fontWeight: '700', textTransform: 'uppercase'`.

code.finding: GFM table parsing was missing entirely ‚Äî table lines fell through to the paragraph accumulator and rendered as raw text. Fix: detect table by header row containing `|` followed by separator `/^\|?[\s|:=-]*-+[\s|:=-]*\|?$/`, add `isTableStart(j)` guard in paragraph accumulator to prevent pipe-containing paragraph lines from being misidentified.

Checkpoint rows are interleaved with event items by sorting on `createdAt ?? indexedAt`. The `CheckpointRow` component uses a `useState` expanded flag, renders a collapsible dropdown with section icons (‚úì Outcome, ‚óé Repo, </> Code, ‚Ü∫ Workflow, ‚ñ≥ Friction, ‚óá Open items), and navigates to CheckpointDetail on tap.
Used `findUnique` + conditional `create` instead of `upsert` with `update: {}` for CheckpointMessage to avoid unexpected upsert behavior on already-indexed UUIDs.
`generateInteractionOverview` is called non-blockingly (fire-and-forget, no `await`) on Stop events to avoid delaying the hook response pipeline.

workflow: Entire CLI checkpoints live in a git branch (`entire/checkpoints/v1`); use `git worktree add /tmp/entire-checkpoints entire/checkpoints/v1` to check out files for indexing, then `git worktree remove` to clean up.
When adding a new Prisma relation table, existing records won't be backfilled automatically ‚Äî a re-index run is needed to populate the new join table from historical data.
Rejected storing nested JSON summary fields as a blob on CheckpointSession; normalized into a dedicated `CheckpointSummary` table with individual typed columns for querying and display.

friction: Prisma schema edits failed when `old_string` didn't match after prior edits modified the file ‚Äî required reading the file before each edit to get the current state.
Port 3000 EADDRINUSE on server restart required `lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9` before restarting.
The `backfill-overviews` CLI flag name didn't match expected format on first invocation attempt, requiring a flag correction.
Paragraph accumulator guard `!line.includes('|')` was too broad and broke paragraphs containing pipe characters; needed the narrower `isTableStart(j)` check instead.
First summary field approach (JSON blob on CheckpointSession) was rejected by the user mid-implementation, requiring a schema redesign to a normalized relation table.
open_items: The `CheckpointSessionLink` re-index to populate historical data was not confirmed to have fired the upserts correctly ‚Äî only message counts were verified (0 new messages), not link row counts.

The `GET /api/sessions/:sessionId/checkpoints` route is implemented but not yet surfaced in the SessionDetail UI beyond the interleaved checkpoint rows ‚Äî no dedicated 'all checkpoints for this session' view exists.
The `checkpointTranscriptStart` and `transcriptLinesAtStart` fields on CheckpointSession are always null in current local data (version-dependent field not present in the indexed checkpoints).
No UI yet for `InteractionOverview` on the ActiveSessions list screen ‚Äî overviews are only shown in SessionDetail.
The Checkpoints list screen subscribes to WebSocket updates but checkpoint indexing is a manual CLI step ‚Äî no automatic watch/polling for new checkpoint directories.
